In its Suspended Form, it likes to manue:
In its Suspended Form, it likes to manuever itself similar to what is called a "yo-yo".
In this form it is not very powerful, but when angered, it shifts into its true form. It will roll around the walls endlessly and run over all in its path.
Closed quarters is its best environment for combat.
Ferrothorn volunteered itself to become:
Ferrothorn volunteered itself to become a rift. Though, it probably did not know what it was getting itself into.
While the transformation was painful, it quite likes its new form. It uses its body as a wheel and playfully drives itself across all kinds of terrain.
It was abandoned by Flora when it stopped obeying her commands in favor of playing around. It seems to have been quite annoyed that you found and defeated it.
A being made completely of fire and spec:
A being made completely of fire and spectral energy. Its origins are a mystery, but there's one thing that is known.
It holds deep regrets over failing to protect its Trainer.
It can't keep one Type down. Maybe that's why it couldn't do something basic like protect its Trainer.
Chandelure turning into a Rift is a spec:
Chandelure turning into a Rift is a special case. It was not originally in contact with Rift Matter at all... Perhaps holding on to so much regret in death can have adverse effects. There are legends of people turning into monsters if they die with massive amounts of lingering anger or regrets. Perhaps the same is true for Pokémon. If Narcissa found Chandelure in this state, I wonder if it would stay this way?
Oddly, the sphere holding the flame in the center is completely still while the rest of its body revolves around it.
This being was created by Team Xen Execu:
This being was created by Team Xen Executive Zetta.

A conglomerate of Magikarp fused together to create this chaotic beast.

It lacks individual thought. Gyarados constantly shifts through dimensions without cause or direction.
The Magikarp used to make this creature: The Magikarp used to make this creature had absolutely no dreams or aspirations in life. They were simple Magikarp...that's what you would think at face value, but this could not be any farther from the truth. Each Magikarp dreamed of one day becoming a Gyarados. They say be careful what you wish for and that's true in this case. Now all these Magikarp are fighting for individuality, but that will never come. If it were to be left unattended, it would endlessly hop through dimensions without reason or purpose. Just a sad waste of space.
Galvantula's heart is completely closed:
Galvantula's heart is completely closed due to her untimely demise.
Her spirit is tied to this realm entirely by her maternal need to care for her young.
Attacking her children will anger her greatly.
A second one that happens to be a mother: A second one that happens to be a mother... I'm sensing a pattern here. This Galvantula's original home is unknown, but its children now infest Amethyst Cave. There aren't enough to cause any immediate population troubles, but over the next few years there may be a serious change in ecosystem. Regardless, this Galvantula won't see its children thrive-- If they even have that chance.
This Volcanion is but a child. It was ta:
This Volcanion is but a child. It was taken from its mother from deep within Valor Mountain.

It is constantly in despair over being unable to see its mother ever again.

It is completely, and quite pathetically, stationary.
Volcanion was born in the very core of V: Volcanion was born in the very core of Valor Mountain. Its said that the entrance to this core is hidden. So how did Team Xen find it? Regardless, it was found, and it was taken by Xen Executive, Madelis. Though this Volcanion being chosen was an error on her part, as this fate was meant for its mother. Not that it matters. It did the job its mother was supposed to do anyways. I wonder what she's thinking now? I bet she's still there in the core of Valor Mountain now. Grieving over the loss of her child.
This Rift was created long ago through t:
This Rift was created long ago through the power of the Cursed Root.
There are texts that detail its affinity for music and dancing.
Although it lacks eyes, it is able to use echolocation.

Apparently it can also make fresh beats.
This Carnivine was once owned by a boy i: This Carnivine was once owned by a boy in a nearby village. These two one day wandered into the temple without permission and stumbled upon a sacred tomb. In this tomb laid the Cursed Root. For entering this chamber, they were both punished by Enamorus. The boy was to share the pain the Cursed Root felt. Whenever humans would commit atrocities to nature, the boy would suffer for their sins. In turn, Carnivine would also forever stay within the temple to guard the Cursed Root for eternity. Those who defile Gaia will learn to beg for her mercy.
Garbodor was turned into a Rift by Zetta:
Garbodor was turned into a Rift by Zetta when it gained the upper hand on him in battle.
It is searching endlessly for Melia.
Validation and praise for protecting its mother is all it wants.
Though...
It's trash, and it knows it.
Garbodor had continued to fight both Zet:
Garbodor had continued to fight both Zetta and Code: Evo all on its own, and fortunately, due to its typing, was able to almost win.
In a last ditch effort, Zetta transformed Garbodor into a monster.
Garbodor had already been born under mysterious circumstances. Its experience in life could not help to resist this curse--the lack of which enhanced its own corruption.
It threw itself into the sea in hopes to swim back to East Gearen in hopes of finding Melia, but instead found the lonely depths of the West Gearen Sewers. A fitting place for something so disgusting.
Aelita's curse incarnate. Passed down by:
Aelita's curse incarnate. Passed down by both Vivian and Taelia, this curse is tired of being chained.

She wants her perfect world and you are in the way of that.
Her True Shot increases Ball and Bomb moves by 30%.
That's going to hurt.
You might die here.
Aelita's past is one that has been purpo:
Aelita's past is one that has been purposefully hidden from her. Now that truth can be hidden no longer. Though, why does she manifest in this way? To fight from afar, and to hide away in a vast world only a child could love...
Is this a result of her stubborn nature, or does she truly live for her own self isolation?
Though the curse has seemingly been "destroyed", it will always be a part of her.
That is her mark. It is her punishment for acting on forces humans have no business bothering.
The blame is not on her, but on Vivian.
May her soul be damned.
Corruption found its way into this one a:
Corruption found its way into this one at a young age, but "Master Indriad" was able to release it.
Her DNA holds traces of Gallade, which gave birth to the glaive on her right arm.

Her ability, Execution, will lay waste to Pokémon with low health.
Behold, the Angel of Death.
She was once thought to be lost to the c:
She was once thought to be lost to the calamity, but she bided her time within the depths of Zone Zero.

Flora, "regrettably", used her power to ward people away from Zone Zero.

With her ability, she will keep Stockpiling every turn. Don't get eaten now...
Gloria was a Hippopotas that survived th:
Gloria was a Hippopotas that survived the Calamity. It burrowed itself within the ground when the land was torn apart. How it became corrupted is unknown. Perhaps it fell into one of the many craters leading to the abyss? It's impossible to say, but one thing is to be certain. It lived so that it could find its Trainer again one day. She won't die until she does. Unless, of course, she is killed.
...
She says she's looking for that girl with pink hair again. The one that played piano so ''beautifully''?
Do you happen to know who she is referring to?
Its true body hides within the degraded:
Its true body hides within the degraded vessel of Celesia's Clefairy Doll.

Its trickery should not be underestimated.
With its electric currents, it can mess with the flow of time.
This one feels a bit scary, doesn't it? Lowering its stats is useless.
This one is a bit interesting. It has be: This one is a bit interesting. It has been corrupted without the use of Rift Matter, and it also seems to havea gained a bit of sentience. I have to wonder if that's due to the Pokémon's own intellect, or the girl who died with it? Perhaps both? Either way, Dufaux, as it calls itself, is able to hold itself a bit higher due to its ability to communicate. Its power to travel through time also piques my interest... Its electricity is able to pierce through the world? Or maybe it's communicating and giving commands to the Core? I will study this one for future use, I think.
In its initial form, its true power lies:
In its initial form, its true power lies dormant, but do not underestimate this one. It will shake your world to its core.
And without your core...
You're nothing.
As always.
All those who threaten the Earth shall burn.
Torterra, as a Turtwig, was present duri: Torterra, as a Turtwig, was present during the attack on Alamissa. It was brought back by one of the surviving members of the attack, who would later go to become an Admin. Torterra's bitterness towards the attack on Alamissa has influenced its current form. The fires that scared it do so no more. When its power is unleashed, it controls the flames now. If Torterra was never destroyed, one may imagine that it would abandon its tower and hunt down the ones who destroyed its home. Unfortunately for it, that will never happen.
This Finneon once belonged to a Trainer,:
This Finneon once belonged to a Trainer, now deceased, from Artrica Island!
It wants nothing more than to fight!
Ally!
Foe!
No such words matter to it when the fight begins! Better be ready to put the dukes up!
This fish does not care about Team Xen. All it wants to do is constantly fight tough opponents. The opponents it faced down in The Underground weren't much to write home about. Before the Interceptor appeared, it was planning on leaving its tower so that it could face its toughest opponent yet: The Xenpurgis. It's unknown whether or not it could defeat the Xenpurgis, but it doesn't care. Fighting a worthy opponent and dying is a noble way to die in its eyes. From fists to fury and from fury to death.
Both danced underneath the large cherry:
Both danced underneath the large cherry blossom tree on Route 2.
When one was taken, the other followed.
Never separated.
They dance forever, together,
underneath the pale shadow of the moon.
Those who dare to separate them shall know true wrath.
Both Petilil are native to Route 2. When:
Both Petilil are native to Route 2. When the moon would come out, both would practice dancing together. This is a secret, so tell no one. These two are lovers that have died and were reborn as Pokémon. They were killed in the ancient war that involved all 7 kingdoms during a performance.
They say that their dances could ease the hearts of all who gazed upon them. This was later proven to be false, as the Queen of the Ghovora held their performance as nothing more than a cheap attempt to gain her favor.
Rumor has it that this apple was picked:
Rumor has it that this apple was picked during Team Xen's invasion of Terajuma Island.

This tree wants nothing more than to spread its vines and feed its young.
Hey.
You look kind of tasty. Wanna be its first meal?
I hear it's an honor to die to a Dragon.
This Applin hails from Jirukala Cavern o: This Applin hails from Jirukala Cavern on Terajuma Island. It was captured by a regular Grunt and brought back to the Xen HQ. The previous specimen meant to take its slot for the Xenpurgis could not reach the potential it wanted. With Applin's tie to Hydrapple, it was taken and used as its replacement. Hydrapple unfortunately found itself in a situation that could not be worse. As a pacifist, it refuses to fight. When the scientists at the Xen Lab noticed this, they enhanced its Rift Matter to force it to obey and fight.
The Queen of all Rift Pokémon. All forms: The Queen of all Rift Pokémon. All forms of corruption are born from her. Additionally, all forms of corruption are at her disposal. She connects her appendages to all corners of the world to release her young. Then, in turn, they harvest data from all living things.
The Queen's power has been amplified usi: The Queen's power has been amplified using the aura of Anju and the physical husk of Vitus. Her purpose is to gather as much data from all corners of the world for her own Queen, Storm-Nym. Her appendages have the same properties as Rift Gyarados: they can extend themselves, shift into other dimensions and worlds, and release her offspring. Because of this power, the Queen is completely stationary. Not that it matters, though. Her defenses cannot be penetrated. No Pokémon is strong enough to shatter this gem. I have to hand it to Lorna...she knew what she was doing with this one. Regardless, her best is my worst, after all. She laid out her Queen. Just wait for my King.
These forms of Nihilego lacks individual: These forms of Nihilego lacks individuality. They all work together in a hive-mind to harvest data to bring back to the Queen. Its shell is hard and hard to scratch. For the normal person, running is the only option.
